content.hero_heading: Savor the Art of Fine Dining
content.hero_description: Experience culinary excellence with our hand-crafted dishes, made from locally sourced organic ingredients in a warm, inviting atmosphere.
feature_descriptions: Exquisite Menu: A curated selection of seasonal dishes crafted by award-winning chefs.
Easy Reservations: Book your table online in seconds and secure your dining experience.
Fresh Ingredients: We partner with local farms to bring the freshest organic ingredients to your plate.
content.about_text: Founded in 2015, Gusto Bistro has been dedicated to redefining the dining experience. We combine traditional culinary techniques with modern innovation to create unforgettable flavors.
content.footer_text: © 2024 Gusto Bistro. All rights reserved. Crafting memorable dining experiences daily.
